capturePlanSummary: Deterministic full-flow smoke capture with world-stage fallback: auth, lobby, ready, movement, then before/after screenshots and probes around the sunken-canyon-stage portal transition (default -> sunken-canyon layout swap).

screenshots.description: Gameplay after dodge roll with cooldown HUD.
Default stage in gameplay BEFORE the world-stage transition.
New sunken-canyon stage AFTER the questUpdate layout swap from sunken-canyon-stage.

probes.description: After readying all players and entering gameplay.

objective.label: Initiate Vault: Sweep annex holding pens in scripted waves and breach the vault mouth.
